walkthrough_scenarios.discovery_integrity_intent: Crawler discovers exactly 104 sitemap URLs
Sitemap count matches route registry count
Sitemap count matches public route count
Public file registry remains aligned
No public HTML route outside registry and sitemap
No route registry entry missing from sitemap
No sitemap URL resolves to missing file
robots.txt allows intended public crawl
No accidental noindex on public pages
Canonical URLs correct on core pages
Meta titles and descriptions reference-grade
Open Graph tags reference-grade
Homepage reflects 104 routes
System map reflects 104 routes
Homepage gives clear entry without funnel
System map gives structural navigation without dashboard/product suite
Human reader moves from homepage to reading/system map without workflow drift
AI agent identifies homepage as reference entry
AI agent identifies system map as structural map
AI agent identifies reading sequences as navigation not workflow
AI agent identifies retrieval index as route organization not search engine
AI agent identifies citation orientation as guidance not generator/service
AI agent identifies source-use as boundary not proof/certification
AI agent identifies strategic review as legibility not pitch/sales
AI agent identifies reviewer packet as public review support
